metadata.name: Spree — Final Showdown mode 2 destroys all creatures
metadata.description: P1 casts Final Showdown (a Spree instant) choosing only mode 2 (+{3}{W}{W}: destroy all creatures). Total cost is {W} base + {3}{W}{W} mode 2 = {3}{W}{W}{W}. P2 controls Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic. Both players pass priority; on resolution mode 2 fires and all creatures are destroyed. Asserts that P2's battlefield is cleared and P1's life is unchanged.
metadata.generation_notes: Spree (CR 702.172) is a variant of the modal mechanic. A Spree spell has a base cost and one or more additive mode costs; the caster chooses which modes to add and pays the sum. Here only mode 2 (+{3}{W}{W}: destroy all creatures) is chosen, making the total cost {W}+{3}{W}{W} = {3}{W}{W}{W} (generic:3, white:3). Modes 0 and 1 are DSL gaps (lose-all-abilities and gain-indestructible are not yet representable) so they are intentionally omitted to keep the script engine-runnable. P2 has two 1/1 creatures (Llanowar Elves, Elvish Mystic). After resolution, destroy all creatures fires (CR 701.7a), both creatures go to P2's graveyard (CR 704.5g / SBAs), and the battlefield is empty. P1's life remains 40. The cast uses harness action cast_spell_modal with modes:[2]. Final Showdown is not in the Available Cards list; it is verified to exist in the engine card registry as a Spree instant.

script.step_note: P1 casts Final Showdown choosing only mode 2 (destroy all creatures)

actions.description: Initial: Final Showdown in p1 hand; p2 controls two creatures; p1 has {3}{W}{W}{W} available
actions.note: Setup verified before spell is cast.
CR 702.172a: Spree spell. P1 pays base cost {W} plus mode-2 additional cost {3}{W}{W}, totalling {3}{W}{W}{W}. Mode 2 chosen: destroy all creatures.

actions.description: After casting: Final Showdown on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Final Showdown is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority; top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 701.7a: Mode 2 resolves — all creatures are destroyed; Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic move to p2's graveyard.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Spell resolves; mode 2 effect executes; Final Showdown moves to p1's graveyard.
CR 704.3: SBAs checked after resolution. Creatures were already destroyed by the spell effect; no additional SBAs needed.

actions.description: After resolution: p2 battlefield empty, p1 life unchanged, Final Showdown in p1 graveyard
actions.note: Mode 2 (destroy all creatures) resolved correctly. Both of p2's creatures are in the graveyard. P1's life is unaffected.
